files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. Transform section 6 (Prerequisites) into a visual diagram. Section 8 (Estimated Time) should reference individual file times, not give a new total. Content is good as an overview but lacks the 3W structure—add 'What You Will Learn' (What), 'Why These Skills Matter' (Why with real-world applications), and 'How to Navigate This Module' (learning path).
files.01_High_Performance_Computing.md: Strong content with good technical depth. Add Learning Objectives upfront. Missing Key Takeaways summary at end. Section 1 (Domain Decomposition) has excellent ASCII diagrams—keep these. Add 'What is HPC?' (What), 'Why parallel computing matters' (Why with speedup examples), and 'How to implement parallel runs' (practical workflow). Section 4 Linear Solvers duplicates content that will appear in 03_Numerical_Methods.md—consolidate to avoid redundancy.
files.02_Advanced_Turbulence.md: Good selection criteria table at start. Add Learning Objectives. Missing Key Takeaways. Strong on 'What' (LES/DES/transition) but weak on 'Why'—add motivation sections before each major topic explaining when and why to use each method. Transition modeling section needs more practical setup details. Cost comparison table is excellent—keep this. Add workflow diagrams for LES vs DES setup.
files.03_Numerical_Methods.md: Significant redundancy issue: Section 3 (Linear Solver Optimization) duplicates content from 01_High_Performance_Computing.md Section 4. Section 4 (Parallel Computing) duplicates the entire workflow from 01_High_Performance_Computing.md. These sections should be removed or consolidated. Focus this file purely on AMR and High-Order Schemes. Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. Missing 'Why AMR matters' motivation. Section 1 needs more explanation of refinement criteria selection.
files.04_Multiphysics.md: Excellent ASCII art for coupling schemes—keep these. Add Learning Objectives. Missing Key Takeaways. Strong on 'What' but needs more 'Why'—when to choose each coupling type. Section 6 (Multi-Region Case Structure) is good practical detail. FSI section has interface conditions but lacks step-by-step setup guidance. CHT section is well-structured. Consider adding troubleshooting section for common coupling issues.

global_strategy: Apply consistent 3W Framework (What/Why/How) across all files. Every file needs Learning Objectives at start and Key Takeaways at end. Resolve redundancy: move all parallel computing and linear solver content to 01_High_Performance_Computing.md only, remove from 03_Numerical_Methods.md. 03_Numerical_Methods.md should focus exclusively on AMR and discretization schemes. Ensure all files reference prerequisites from earlier modules. Add estimated reading time per file. Include practical exercises/tutorials for each major topic.
